title: SHC Spiders Add-on
description: Adds some more skins for the Spider using the model provided by SHC Spiders
body:
I really liked the model introduced in the [SHC Spiders Resource Pack](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/shc-spiders), but it needed to have more skins for the spider, so with the permission of [ShadowsCrow](https://www.planetminecraft.com/member/shadowscrow/), I have created this resource pack.

I am no Entomologist, and my texture work is closer to the Programmer Art resource pack, so forgive me if some of my textures a bit wonky lol.

# Spider List
- Red-back Spider
- Red-Headed Mouse Spider
- St Andrew’s Cross Spider
- Mexican Red Knee Tarantula

# Planned Features
- More Spiders
- Nametags to gaurentee skins

# Requirements
- You are required to also have [SHC Spiders](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/shc-spiders) installed to correctly use this Add-on pack.
- Make sure that this Add-on is on top of SHC Spiders in the load order, Like the image bellow
  ![Resource Pack Load Order](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d063d962c99b8c8f020621933af73bae78ab22d2.png)
- You must have either [Optifine](https://optifine.net/home) or [[ETF] Entity Texture Features](https://modrinth.com/mod/entitytexturefeatures) in order to see the alternate Spider textures incuded in this pack

# Troubleshooting
For when things stop working

## Its not working, I cant see the textures or the model is broken
- Make sure that you have Optifine installed and that random entities is ON or that ETF installed
- If you have any Resource Packs that also edit the spider model or adds multiple textures for the spider, it will not let this Add-on pack load, and might also override the base packs model.

## Support and Issue Tracking
I cant promise I can help, but shoot me a msg on Planet Minecraft with as much detail related to trying to use the pack, and I will try and lend a hand. I'm not going to respond to msgs that are similar to "Its not working, help" with no other information.
